examples: As she speaks, her emotional gaze shifts from the ground, to my eyes, to the moonlit sky, to the ground, and back to my eyes again.
The stage lighting gives the effect of a moonlit scene.
Zhang Ruoxu, Tang Dynasty poet, is widely known for his poem A Moonlit Night on the Spring River.
Trying not to breathe, I turned my head and saw the moonlit shadow of a lioness.
Yet the tiny, undated "Moonlit Landscape" by Ralph Blakelock is a throwback to the grand manner.
